metadata.title: Tritech Group Limited
metadata.description: A Unique Urban Infrastructure, Water & Environmental One Stop Solution Provider. Listed on SGX Singapore.

hero.tagline: A Unique One Stop Solution Provider
hero.title: Urban Infrastructure, Water & Environmental Technology
hero.subtitle: Listed on SGX Singapore since 2008. Powering smart urban development and water technologies across Asia-Pacific.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.description: A Unique One Stop Integrated Service Provider for Smart Urban Development and Water & Environmental Protection.
whoWeAre.innovation: Built on the foundation of innovative technologies, winning the market through technological advantages and competitiveness.

smartUrban.title: Smart Urban Development
smartUrban.description: Integrated services for smart urban development including IoT, data analytics, cloud computing, 4D simulation, and AI digital platforms.

waterEnv.title: Water & Environmental
waterEnv.description: Leading water-related business providing membrane products, smart technologies, engineering solutions, and environmental protection services.

innovation.title: Powered by Innovation, Driven by Technology
innovation.subtitle: Our innovation centres leverage Big Data, IoT, and AI to deliver cutting-edge solutions.

profile.title: Corporate Profile
profile.description: Tritech Group Limited is a home grown enterprise established in Singapore in 1999. With the enduring effort from the founder Dr. Jeffrey Wang and his team of aspiring entrepreneurs, Tritech has grown from a small firm providing engineering services to a company with presence in the Asia-Pacific region.

philosophy.title: Philosophy
philosophy.description: The Group strives to discover new value and crystallize it into value for society. As a business producer that pursues lifestyle quality for the times, we create technology at its highest fidelity compatible with the public good.

smartUrban.title: Smart Urban Development
items: IoT, data collection, data analytics, cloud computing & 4D simulation
Planning, design, consultancy and management of city development

waterEnv.title: Water & Environmental Protection
items: Membrane water treatment systems (UF, MBR, RO)

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: Join our team of professionals and innovators
careers.description: We are always looking for talented and dedicated individuals to join our growing team. If you share our passion for innovation and excellence, we welcome you to explore career opportunities with us.
